attributes: Carton Optical (Japan) • Turret Stereo 15X/30XW/45X • Original Box + Foam + Eyepieces • Spiegel Ticket
condition_notes: Carton Optical (Japan) turret stereo binocular microscope giving three fixed powers — 15X, 30XW (wide-field), 45X — via a rotating drum. Body marked 'Carton STEREO 15X 30XW 45X'; stage plate marked 'JAPAN'. Includes original box with molded foam, bagged eyepieces, and a spare illuminator/tube. Optics appear clear; mechanically functional on inspection (not lab-calibrated). Retains original Spiegel retail ticket (reg $99.98, marked $59.95) as provenance. Vintage, likely 1970s-80s.

square.buy_link_note: Square checkout 2026-06-19: $68 + $18 flat shipping (fragile pack) = $86; asks for shipping address.

ebay.note: Draft to be created; ships fragile (pack with foam insert).

info.use: price tag — scan for item card

shipping.notes: Fragile optics — ship in original foam-fitted box inside an outer carton.
